title: RuleProjectionEnvelope (DRAFT)
description: Draft envelope for an ADR-bound authoritative rule projection. Pre-normative: do not rely on $id stability until promoted in ste-spec ADR + INV index.

envelope_version.description: Draft envelope format version (semver of this sketch, not ruleset).

projection_id.description: Stable identifier for this projection instance (UUID or content-addressed id).

projection_kind.description: Discriminator for downstream gates and UI.

adr_id.description: ADR identifier in the authoring kit namespace.

adr_content_hash.description: Optional content-address of ADR body at bind time (recommended for signatures).

adr_revision.description: Optional human or tool revision label.

ruleset_version.description: Semver or declared catalog version of ste-rules-library (or fork).

rules_catalog_hash.description: Optional hash over the ordered rule closure used for the projection.

closure_expansion.description: Optional URI or CAS key explaining how to expand from pin to full closure.

rule_projection_payload.description: Machine-native slice: rule ids, prompts, checks, or references. Shape TBD per rules-engine.

attestation.description: Optional signed attestation or detached signature blob from rules-engine (format TBD).

human_projection_ref.description: Optional URI or artifact id for human-oriented summary derived from this envelope.

issued_at.description: Issuance timestamp; must not affect deterministic verify inputs (use content hashes for identity).
